title: rosa × vetteri var. obovata
intro: Rosa × vetteri var. obovata is a variety of flowering plant known as the Rosa × vetteri, a cross between Rosa centifolia and Rosa moschata, commonly used in perfumery and herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual disorders, due to its flavonoid and essential oil content. The health benefits of Rosa × vetteri var. obovata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
